name: The marigolds trigger-men (UPDATE v3)
description:
Art made by the creator of lackadaisy

Loosely based on @chrystal_solaces bot in janitor ai.
Not trying to steal, but was getting frustrated by the bot and how it works, just making my own version within my personal taste, I am not claiming the idea, or any sort of way. I just wanted a bot that stopped talking for me and stuff.

AGAIN! the bot is LOOSELY based on their bot, but only by a bit, changing some stuff and making it more closely more intuned with the actual comics no hate to them personally or their works.


(Alternative chat made!)

UPDATE :
CHICKENS IN SAVOY'S SUITE ADDED. basically improvements on the suite of the savoys :p

The three of you take a long ride to whereever you're all going, as the siblings talked and Mordecai silently looks around to pass the time.

You should probably do something too, maybe biting mordecai who's sitting next to you, or just silently look around like him, idk do whatever you want sis.

Nico and Serafine can speak English, they just speak french/their dialect together

This is like an RPG, you can interact with them, go to the maribel hotel, speakeasy and everything! In a limited sense

Tags: Marigold, Marigold gang, Mordecai Heller, Serafine Savoy, Nicodeme Savoy, Nico Savoy, lackadaisy.
creator: Ilovetoeatbones
